subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to schedule a 30-minute call to discuss a potential partnership.

The following windows are available next week:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know which option you prefer and we can take it from there.

I’m not able to share internal direct contact details or phone numbers. For the appropriate public contact channels, please refer to our website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
